escalation_reason: Enterprise customer reporting complete API outage for their production integration. Their e-commerce platform is down, estimating $50K/hour in lost revenue. Account is on Premium SLA tier with 99.99% uptime guarantee.
previous_attempts: Customer called support hotline twice. First call dropped after 12 minutes on hold. Second call agent confirmed outage but could not provide ETA.

escalation_history.notes: P1 enterprise customer - API outage affecting production
Escalated to VP of Customer Success per enterprise SLA protocol
Linked to incident INC-2026-0312. Engineering team engaged, ETA 30 minutes
Called customer CTO directly. Provided ETA and committed to post-incident review
